title: 1. 生日快要到了
english_summary: Xiao Ming's friend has a birthday coming up, so he goes to the mall to find her a present and picks a new red backpack.
content:
小明的朋友小云快要过生日了。
小明想送她一个东西。
小明：送什么好呢？
他去商场看看。
商场里东西很多。
他看到一块手表。
但是手表太贵了。
因为小云的书包坏了，所以他买了一个新书包。
书包是红色的。
小明希望她喜欢。
english_content:
Xiao Ming's friend Xiao Yun's birthday is almost here.
Xiao Ming wants to give her something.
Xiao Ming: What should I give her?
He goes to the mall to look around.
There are many things in the mall.
He sees a watch.
But the watch is too expensive.
Because Xiao Yun's backpack is broken, he buys a new backpack.
The backpack is red.
Xiao Ming hopes she likes it.

title: 2. 生日快乐
english_summary: At the party everyone sings together and Xiao Ming gives Xiao Yun the red backpack — her favorite color.
content:
今天是小云的生日。
朋友们都来了。
大家一起唱歌。
小明说：生日快乐！
他把新书包送给小云。
小云很高兴。
小云：这个颜色我最喜欢！
因为书包是红色的。
大家都笑了。
这是一个快乐的生日。
english_content:
Today is Xiao Yun's birthday.
All her friends have come.
Everyone sings together.
Xiao Ming says: Happy birthday!
He gives the new backpack to Xiao Yun.
Xiao Yun is very happy.
Xiao Yun: This is my favorite color!
Because the backpack is red.
Everyone laughs.
It is a happy birthday.

title: 3. 一起运动
english_summary: In the afternoon they go to the park; the boys play soccer, Xiao Yun jogs, and everyone tires out and rests.
content:
下午，大家一起去公园。
公园很大，人也很多。
男孩儿们想踢足球。
小明：我们一起运动吧！
他们踢了很长时间。
小云在旁边跑步。
天气很好，太阳很大。
大家都很快乐。
但是他们已经很累了。
所以他们坐下来休息。
english_content:
In the afternoon, everyone goes to the park together.
The park is big, and there are many people.
The boys want to play soccer.
Xiao Ming: Let's exercise together!
They play for a long time.
Xiao Yun jogs nearby.
The weather is nice, the sun is bright.
Everyone is very happy.
But they are already very tired.
So they sit down to rest.

title: 4. 脚疼了
english_summary: Xiao Ming's foot starts to hurt; Xiao Yun helps him to the pharmacy next to the park and buys him medicine.
content:
玩的时候，小明的脚很疼。
小云：你怎么了？
小明：我的脚很疼，不能走。
小云说：我帮你。
他们一起去药店。
药店就在公园旁边。
小云给小明买了药。
小明吃了药，好多了。
小明：谢谢你。
小明：你真是我的好朋友。
english_content:
While playing, Xiao Ming's foot hurts a lot.
Xiao Yun: What happened?
Xiao Ming: My foot hurts, I can't walk.
Xiao Yun says: I'll help you.
They go to the pharmacy together.
The pharmacy is right next to the park.
Xiao Yun buys medicine for Xiao Ming.
Xiao Ming takes the medicine and feels much better.
Xiao Ming: Thank you.
Xiao Ming: You are really a good friend of mine.

title: 5. 快乐的生日
english_summary: As night falls they head home together, laughing all the way — a happy birthday even with a sore foot.
content:
天已经黑了。
大家准备回家。
小云：今天真快乐！
小明：是的，因为有你们。
虽然我的脚疼，但是我很高兴。
小云：下次我们再一起来。
小明笑着说：好！
他们一起走回家。
路上，大家一直在笑。
这真是一个快乐的生日。
english_content:
It is already dark.
Everyone gets ready to go home.
Xiao Yun: Today was so much fun!
Xiao Ming: Yes, because of all of you.
Although my foot hurts, I am very happy.
Xiao Yun: Next time let's come together again.
Xiao Ming says with a smile: Okay!
They walk home together.
On the way, everyone keeps laughing.
It really was a happy birthday.
